title: Drunost
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Drunost |region=[[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} |sector=[[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]][[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] |system=[[Drunost system/Legends|Drunost system]] |coordinates=M-9 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain=*[[Farm/Legends|Farmland]] *Woods *[[Water/Legends|Rivers]] |water= |interest=[[Consolidated Shipping]] hub |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities=[[Conso City]] |imports= |exports= |affiliation=*Consolidated Shipping *[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] }} {{Quote|A nice little backworld place that happens to have a Consolidated Shipping hub and outlet, which means it'll have all the fuel and supplies we'll need.|The Hand of Judgment's [[Joak Quiller]]|}} '''Drunost''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. A [[Consolidated Shipping]] hub and outlet were located near the planet's largest town, [[Conso City]], making Drunost a good stop for fuel and supplies. Nominally under the jurisdiction of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the world consisted primarily of mines and farmland as well as company towns, and was settled by both [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and [[Alien/Legends|aliens]]. During the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the planet was also home to a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] supply line. The planet was also the scene of [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] activity engaged in by the [[BloodScar]] group. ==Description== Drunost was located in the [[Drunost system/Legends|Drunost system]] of the [[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]], part of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was a two day flight from [[Ranklinge]], another [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. Drunost was home to one of the largest hubs of [[Consolidated Shipping]],{{CSWECite|I|211|Drunost}} a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] business,{{CSWECite|I|138|Consolidated Shipping}} as well as many corporate offices. The hub, located near Drunost's main settlement, [[Conso City]], made the planet a popular stop for fueling and supplies. While Drunost's terrain included [[Water/Legends|rivers]] and woods, the land was mainly used for farming and [[Mining/Legends|mining]], although the planet supported company [[City/Legends|towns]] as well. ==History== {{Quote|Let's talk about something a little more interesting, shall we? Starting with the Bargleg swoop gang. Did you send them to Drunost to intercept a shipment of heavy blaster rifles?''"
"''The BloodScars sent them, yes.|Chief Administrator Vilim Disra and [[Caaldra]], a member of the BloodScars|}} Drunost was involved in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and at one point, [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] were stationed on the planet. Later, the world was able to distance itself from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] business, as the Shelsha sector was scarcely supervised by the Empire, having Imperial [[Garrison/Legends|garrisons]] on only two planets and just one [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] stationed in the area. Consolidated Shipping served as the local authority, doing its best to maintain law and order. [[File:Chewie_Luke_Han.png|thumb|right|300px|Han Solo, Chewbacca, and Luke Skywalker met with Porter on Drunost.]] In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] to [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. a supply of arms for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] that was being transported by [[Porter (Rebel Alliance)|Porter]] and [[Casement]], two agents working for the Rebellion, was targeted by the [[Bargleg swoop gang]], which was affiliated with the [[BloodScar]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] group. However, a gang of former [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] who had deserted from Imperial service and dubbed themselves the [[Hand of Judgment]], protected them, not knowing that in doing so they were helping the Rebel Alliance. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], along with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], were sent as representatives of the Alliance in order to meet with Porter after the incident. They met at a [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcafe]] on Drunost across the street from Consolidated Shipping's Repository and Currency Exchange. A group of three BloodScars were present at the café, watching a group of off-duty military personnel, as the pirate group had planned to rob the repository; this was in fact a cover for them to pick up the BloodScar [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]] survivors held in custody. When the break-in began, the three BloodScars held the soldiers at bay with their [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], until Skywalker, Solo, and Chewbacca intervened, [[Death/Legends|killing]] one BloodScar and detaining the others. However, the robbery carried on, and the raiders made off with fifty thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and their passengers. The Shelsha sector's [[Chief Administrator/Legends|Chief Administrator]] [[Vilim Disra]] claimed that a hundred thousand [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] transmissions left Drunost every [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]]. ==Locations== Drunost's main point of interest was the Consolidated Shipping hub and outlet, which was located northwest of its center of government, Conso City. From the air, the transport business's complex closely resembled the company's star-in-swirl logo. The hub was surrounded by a loose ring of several small [[Permacrete/Legends|permacrete]] landing areas that were used by [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] to pick up shipments and by people coming to purchase items directly from Consolidated's outlet center. The landing fields also had shopping areas from which travelers could buy food and supplies. The planet's major town, Conso City, was located on the edge of a river southeast of the hub. The medium-sized city was the main part of Consolidated's local operation, as Consolidated's repository, their main administrative offices, and the HoloNet center had been established there. Also, in the northern part of town, across the street from the repository, was a tapcafe, which served both [[Human/Legends|Human]] and [[Alien/Legends|alien]] clientele. ==Behind the scenes== Drunost first appeared in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s [[2007]] novel [[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']]. ==Appearances== *[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Drunost |pl=Drunost }} [[Category:Planets in the Colonies]] [[Category:Shelsha sector locations]]
